name: Spicy Pork Chili Dip
description: Traditional Northern Thai dip made with minced pork, tomatoes, and chili pastes, served alongside crisp fresh vegetables.

name: Crispy Deep-Fried Fish
description: Perfectly golden fried fish scored beautifully and served with a tangy, spicy bird's eye chili fish sauce dipping mix.

name: Steamed Curry Fish Mousse
description: Savory Thai curry red paste and fish souffle gently steamed inside custom-folded banana leaf cups, topped with coconut cream.

name: Steamy Ramen Bliss
description: Cozy up with a bowl of rich, savory ramen! Loaded with noodles, veggies, and your fave toppings. Perfect for comfort.

name: Classic Smash Burger
description: Juicy beef patty, melted cheddar, crisp lettuce, tomato, and house-made sauce on a toasted brioche bun.

name: Bay Chaa Fried Rice
description: Traditional fried rice stir-fried with fragrant jasmine rice, garlic, soy sauce, and fresh scallions.

name: Cheesy Margherita Pizza
description: Hot, cheesy, and perfectly baked — stone-baked crust, San Marzano tomato base, fresh mozzarella, and basil.

name: Basil Stir-Fry (Kaphrao)
description: Aromatic minced meat stir-fry packed with fresh holy basil, served alongside a perfect mound of steamed rice.

name: Indonesian Chicken Skewers
description: Sate Ayam (Indonesian skewered grilled meat), beautifully presented with a rich peanut dipping sauce.

name: Bai Sach Chrouk
description: Poached pork and shrimp served with a mountain of fresh greens and a fiery dipping sauce.

name: Pork Belly Lettuce Wraps
description: Platter featuring grilled pork belly, mushrooms, and garlic, designed for fresh lettuce wraps.

name: Cambodian Shaking Beef
description: Wok-seared cubes of marinated beef served over a bed of fresh greens and tomato.

name: Fresh Spring Rolls
description: Rice paper rolls filled with shrimp, vermicelli, herbs, and served with a rich peanut dipping sauce.

name: Spicy Papaya Salad
description: Shredded green papaya pounded with chili, lime, peanuts, and dried shrimp.

name: Tom Yum Goong
description: Classic spicy and sour soup with shrimp, lemongrass, galangal, and kaffir lime leaves.

name: Yakitori
description: Wok-fried rice noodles with egg, bean sprouts, tofu, and crushed peanuts.

name: Green Curry Chicken
description: A creamy coconut-based green curry with tender chicken, bamboo shoots, and Thai basil.

name: Mango Sticky Rice
description: Sweet glutinous rice served with ripe mango slices and coconut cream drizzle.

name: Iced Thai Milk Tea
description: Sweet, creamy, and chilled Thai tea served over ice.

name: Crispy Tofu Bites
description: Golden fried tofu cubes served with a sweet and spicy chili sauce.

name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
description: Large shrimp sautéed in a fragrant garlic butter sauce with fresh parsley.

name: Beef Lok Lak
description: Tender beef stir-fry with a signature lime and black pepper dipping sauce.

name: Vegetable Spring Rolls
description: Crispy fried rolls filled with cabbage, carrots, and glass noodles.

name: Lemongrass Grilled Chicken
description: Succulent chicken marinated in lemongrass and grilled to perfection.

name: Coconut Ice Cream
description: Refreshing dairy-free coconut ice cream served in a shell.

name: Pineapple Fried Rice
description: Savory fried rice with pineapple, cashews, raisins, and a touch of curry powder.

name: Lemongrass Tea
description: Warm, soothing herbal tea brewed with fresh lemongrass stalks.

name: Spicy Squid Salad
description: Tender rings of squid tossed in a zesty lime and chili dressing with red onions.

name: Stir-fried Morning Glory
description: Fresh water spinach wok-fried with garlic, chili, and soybean paste.

name: Thai Basil Fried Egg
description: A classic sunny-side-up egg fried until crispy edges, served as a side for any rice dish.
